stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
`\\tsclient` only exists in FreeRDP sessions — not in the VNC browser window (port 8006). VNC is just for Windows setup.

Once Windows is fully installed and RDP works, `winapps manual` handles the FreeRDP connection with `+home-drive` automatically:

```bash
winapps manual "\\tsclient\home\mcrowe\Downloads\foo.exe"
```

If you want a full RDP desktop session (where `\\tsclient` is accessible):

```bash
winapps windows
```

That opens a full Windows desktop via FreeRDP — `\\tsclient\home` will be there in File Explorer.
